mnemonics: AI is like a digital baby: It starts with basic learning (INPUT), grows smarter through experience (PROCESSING), and eventually makes its own decisions (OUTPUT).
Think of AI as a super-powered calculator: It doesn't just add numbers (DATA), it finds patterns (INTELLIGENCE) to predict what comes next (ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE).
keyPoints: AI mimics human intelligence using machines.
Key components include data input, processing algorithms, and intelligent output.
AI systems learn from data to improve their performance over time.
commonMistakes: Confusing AI with automation (AI makes decisions, automation follows rules).
Assuming all AI is self-aware (most AI is narrow and task-specific).
